title: [ExportVerilog] multi-used readinout ops cause extraneous temporaries

features.name: multiple read_inout from same reg used in different operations
features.description: Code should include multiple sv.read_inout operations on the same sv.reg used in different operation contexts (e.g., array construction and arithmetic)
features.snippet:
sv.reg %r : !hw.inout<i3>
%a = sv.read_inout %r : !hw.inout<i3>
%b = sv.read_inout %r : !hw.inout<i3>
%arr = hw.array_create %a, %b : i3
%sum = comb.add %a, %b : i3

features.name: four read_inout results fed into hw.array_create
features.description: Code should include four sv.read_inout operations whose results are all used as elements in an hw.array_create
features.snippet:
%r1 = sv.reg : !hw.inout<i3>
%r2 = sv.reg : !hw.inout<i3>
%r3 = sv.reg : !hw.inout<i3>
%r4 = sv.reg : !hw.inout<i3>
%v1 = sv.read_inout %r1 : !hw.inout<i3>
%v2 = sv.read_inout %r2 : !hw.inout<i3>
%v3 = sv.read_inout %r3 : !hw.inout<i3>
%v4 = sv.read_inout %r4 : !hw.inout<i3>
%arr = hw.array_create %v1, %v2, %v3, %v4 : i3

features.name: read_inout results used in both array indexing and arithmetic
features.description: Code should include sv.read_inout results that are used both in hw.array_get indexing and comb arithmetic operations
features.snippet:
%r = sv.reg : !hw.inout<i3>
%v = sv.read_inout %r : !hw.inout<i3>
%arr = hw.array_create %v, %v, %v, %v : i3
%idx = hw.array_get %arr[%idx_var] : !hw.array<4xi3>
%sum = comb.add %v, %v : i3
